hooks.command: git log main..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' > /tmp/pre-rebase-commit-count.txt || true
CI=true npm run lint && CI=true npm run check && CI=true npm test && if command -v eldev >/dev/null 2>&1; then eldev -p -dtT compile && eldev -dtT test; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running CI checks (lint / check / test / eldev)...

hooks.command: PRE=$(cat /tmp/pre-rebase-commit-count.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 0); POST=$(git log main..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$PRE" -gt 0 ] && [ "$POST" -lt "$((PRE / 2))" ]; then printf '{"systemMessage": "WARNING: Rebase dropped %s of %s commits (before: %s, after: %s). Verify with: git log main..HEAD --oneline"}' "$((PRE - POST))" "$PRE" "$PRE" "$POST"; fi
